label: 110_cent_south african_south africas_south africa
description: South African Reserve Bank officials discussed the central bank's role in setting interest rates and managing inflation. They addressed how global economic conditions and domestic price pressures influenced monetary decisions.

newest_articles.title: A Market-Based Assessment of the Outlook for Inflation Expectations and Monetary Policy in South Africa
newest_articles.excerpt: Using a novel arbitrage-free dynamic term structure model of nominal and real bond prices that accounts for bond-specific liquidity risk premia, this paper provides estimates of bond investors’ inflation expectations and associated inflation risk premia in South African sovereign bonds.
